public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as liaison.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a liaison still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of liaison in and around Iron Accord, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Iron Accord workable through the obligations of liaison while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Iron Accord, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of liaison visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Rhodra Redhinge needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Iron Accord before trust collapses.
Rhodra Redhinge can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Rhodra Redhinge read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Iron Accord: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
